Module 1 - SLP Fundamentals
In this module acts as a refresher on the Straight Line Persuasion system. Now this module is
vitally important. Remember, everything you’re going to learn about Straight Line Marketing is
based on the philosophy of SLP. In that sense, this is the most important module of the entire
course. What you’re about to learn is going to be crucial knowledge as you work your way
through the SLM system.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
